name: PushEventRequest
description: SOAP envelope containing a real-time event for transactional message processing. The rtEvent element includes mandatory attributes for event type and recipient contact, plus a ctx child element for message personalization data.

type.description: Event type name matching the Message Center event configuration.

origin.description: Origin identifier for tracking the event source.

wishedChannel.description: Preferred delivery channel. 0 = email, 1 = mobile (SMS), 2 = phone, 3 = push notification.

mobilePhone.description: Recipient mobile phone number (for SMS channel).

ctx.description: Context data XML element containing personalization variables for the transactional message template.
